svg.title: Centralized policy pipeline for every MCP tool call
svg.desc: Every tool call enters the registry, passes mode and annotation policy, path security, and execution guards, then is classified as a concurrent cached read or a serialized FIFO mutation. Cache hits, handler results, mutation invalidation, and stable failures meet at audit. Successful outcomes return structured content; rejected or failed outcomes terminate as a structured error. Dashed guard-rejection lines are inferred because rejected-call audit ownership is unresolved.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CMP-AUDIT
redacted append-only record
read · mutation · failure

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SYS-STRUCTURED-ERROR
blocked or mapped failure
{code, message, hint}
terminal
